popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description:
Baron Roger Dudley de Somery - was born about 1208, lived in Dinas Powls, Wales and died before 26 Aug 1273 in Staffordshire, England . He was the son of Ralph de Somery and Margaret Fitzgilbert.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley於1194年12月30日出生在威爾士布洛可爾迪納斯時，他的父親Ralph de Somery43歲，母親Margaret Crassus32歲。他於大約1254年與Amabilia Chaucombe結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年8月26日在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley于1194年12月30日出生在威尔士布洛可爾迪納斯时，他的父亲Ralph de Somery43岁，母亲Margaret Crassus32岁。他于大约1254年与Amabilia Chaucombe结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1273年8月26日在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley was born on 30 December 1194, in Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Ralph de Somery, was 43 and his mother, Margaret Crassus, was 32. He married Amabilia Chaucombe about 1254. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 August 1273, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley est né le 30 décembre 1194, à Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Ralph de Somery, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Crassus, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Amabilia Chaucombe environ 1254. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 août 1273, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley am 30. Dezember 1194 in Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Somery 43 und seine Mutter Margaret Crassus 32. Er hat um 1254 Amabilia Chaucombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. August 1273 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley è nato il il 30 dicembre 1194 nel Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Ralph de Somery, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Crassus, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Amabilia Chaucombe circa 1254. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 agosto 1273, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Dudley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudleyが1194年12月30日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアディナスで生まれた時，父Ralph de Someryは43歳，母Margaret Crassusは32歳であった。約1254年にAmabilia Chaucombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年8月26日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley(이)가 1194년 12월 30일 웨일스 p브로케실르 딘아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Somery(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Crassus(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1254년 Amabilia Chaucombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 8월 26일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에 묻혔다.

pt.30 December 1194–26 August 1273: 30 de dezembro de 1194–26 de agosto de 1273
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley nasceu em 30 de dezembro de 1194, em Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Ralph de Somery, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Crassus, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilia Chaucombe aproximadamente 1254. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1273, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley родился 30 декабря 1194 г. в местности динас, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ralph de Somery было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Crassus, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilia Chaucombe около 1254 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 августа 1273 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.30 December 1194–26 August 1273: 30 de diciembre de 1194–26 de agosto de 1273
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley nació el 30 de diciembre de 1194, en Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Ralph de Somery, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Crassus, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Amabilia Chaucombe aproximadamente 1254. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1273, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
